case_title: DELORIS LOGAN VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO,

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-14-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-24-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-21-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CAME INTO THE COURTCLERK'S OFFICE THS MORNING REQUESTIING A CONTINUANCE: MEDICAL. HONORABLE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN ALLOWS THE CONTINUANCE. NO HEARING HELD AND NO APPEARANCES. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $40 WAIVED. SERVED JAN-23-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2023 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,384.00 FILED BY LOGAN, DELORIS AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOGAN, DELORIS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2023 - CONTINUED TO JUN-21-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 502. PLAINTIFF WILL NOT STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM HEARING THE MATTER. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ZOE GRIMALDI, LITIGATION INTERN. FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-21-2023 BY JUDGE JEFFREY S. ROSS. PLAINTIFF DELORIS LOGAN IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS CHARLOTTE LOGAN. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ZOE GRIMALDI (LITIGATION INTERN) WITH WITNESS DEANNA SKAGGS. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS (1-6) RETAINED. JUDGE: JEFFREY S. ROSS; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D502)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOGAN, DELORIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE SEE ATTACHED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
